testing_tools: OWASP ZAP, Burp Suite, Custom Scripts
test_scenarios: ["Attempt privilege escalation by manipulating JWT role claims in API requests","Test secure link token brute-forcing on invoice payment and proposal submission endpoints","Verify session termination on logout across all active tabs","Attempt to bypass MFA by manipulating authentication flow states","Replay attacks on single-use tokens for milestone approvals"]
acceptance_criteria: Zero privilege escalation possible; Tokens invalidated immediately after use; Invalid tokens return 401/403.
reporting_requirements: Immediate alert to CISO; Ticket in Jira Security Board
trend_analysis: Track frequency of broken access control regressions

test_scenarios: ["Send Stripe webhooks with invalid or missing 'Stripe-Signature' headers","Replay valid past webhooks to test idempotency logic in Payment Service","Attempt to modify transaction amounts via API parameter tampering before gateway handoff","Race condition testing on 'Initiate Payout' endpoints to trigger double spending"]
acceptance_criteria: Webhooks without valid signatures rejected (400); Replayed webhooks produce no side effects; Financial data tampering rejected.
reporting_requirements: Audit Trail entry for failed verification; Alert to FinOps

test_scenarios: ["Upload SOW documents containing known PII markers to verify redaction completeness","Attempt prompt injection attacks via SOW text content to manipulate OpenAI output","Verify sanitized SOWs are stored in separate S3 buckets with stricter IAM policies","Test 'Right to Erasure' logic to ensure PII is removed but Transaction logs remain intact"]
acceptance_criteria: 100% redaction of detected PII; No leakage of prompt instructions; Strict data segregation in storage.
reporting_requirements: PII Leakage Report; Compliance Violation Log
trend_analysis: PII detection accuracy rates over time

test_scenarios: ["Upload malware-infected PDFs/DOCX files to test virus scanning triggers","Attempt path traversal attacks via filenames (e.g., '../../etc/passwd.pdf')","Upload executable files disguised as PDFs (MIME type spoofing)","Upload 'Zip bombs' to test DoS resilience of the processing worker"]
acceptance_criteria: Malicious files rejected immediately; Files stored with random UUID names; Executables blocked.
reporting_requirements: Security Incident Report for malware attempts

test_scenarios: ["Brute force login endpoint to verify rate limiting and account lockout","Flood public webhook endpoints to test DDoS resilience","Test CORS policies by originating requests from unauthorized domains","Fuzzing API inputs with large payloads and special characters"]
acceptance_criteria: Rate limits trigger 429 responses; CORS restricts cross-origin access; Inputs sanitized via Zod schemas.
trend_analysis: Traffic anomalies vs Rate Limit hits
